subject: Cart closes in ~36 hours
body:
You have less than 36 hours to grab your 200 copies of $100M Money Models PLUS the mountain of book bonuses.

You can see the full breakdown here: RECAP.ACQ.COM

OR if you prefer to read, I have a letter there that explains everything.

Alex

PS - I'm taking the offer down for good in just 36hrs. So grab the books and claim your insane bonuses here. RECAP.ACQ.COM

To be clear, no purchase will ever change how grateful I am to be on this ride with you. Thank you again.
